verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Down here my burdens are heavy and the road seems rough and long Sometimes my feet grow weary and so slow There's a brighter day a coming, soon I'll step on heaven's shore And I won't have to worry anymore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No, I won't have to worry when I reach the other shore All my troubles will be over and I'll rest forevermore My eyes will be on Jesus, and my heart will be aglow And I won't have to worry any more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Someday when life is over and I've said my last goodbyes I'll see the Savior standing at the door I'll hear him say, "You're welcome. All your cares you've left behind And I won't have to worry anymore
